titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Qasim Ibn Yahya
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Qasim Ibn Yahya

segments: ه عن القاسم بن يحيى فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، و إبراهيم بن هاشم جميعا عن القاسم بن يحيى‌.
arabic.text: ه عن القاسم بن يحيى فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، و إبراهيم بن هاشم جميعا عن القاسم بن يحيى‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Qasim ibn Yahya has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sad ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa and Ibrahim ibn Hashim together, from Al-Qasim ibn Yahya.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Qasim ibn Yahya has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sad ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa and Ibrahim ibn Hashim together, from Al-Qasim ibn Yahya.
